calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: McAllister Street Associates, a California limited partnership.
Defendant: George Oliver present in pro per.
10:05 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Ernesto Molina, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 12-03-02------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 5-10-04------------------ID/EVID.
10:15 a.m. Plaintiff rest.
10:17 a.m. Defendant oral testinmony to the court, no cross, parties rest.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at:
250 McAllister Street, #27, San Francisco.
Per Diem Damages $1,923.52
Attorney's Fees $450.00
Costs is waived.
Total $2,373.52
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
